overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female warrior character exploring a snowy tribal village at night, entering a large wooden longhouse and walking through its candlelit interior toward a stone shrine. The scene transitions from an open exterior with a central campfire to a dimly lit wooden interior with tribal decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village square with central campfire

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy village square past the central campfire toward the large wooden longhouse

notable_agents.action: villager sitting near the campfire in the snow

entered.detail: large burning campfire with stone ring casting warm orange light
large tribal wooden structure with decorated entrance and blue fabric accents
wooden post with burning torch illuminating the snowy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy tribal village square at night, passing a burning campfire with a seated villager nearby. The large wooden longhouse stands ahead, lit by torchlight against the dark blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone steps leading up to the longhouse entrance

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the wooden entrance platform

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the longhouse, the character approaches the stone steps leading to the entrance. The campfire falls behind as the wooden facade of the building fills more of the frame.

events.description: character enters the wooden longhouse from the snowy exterior
passes close by a hooded NPC guard standing at the entrance doorway

agents.ego_description: walking up the steps and entering the longhouse, passing a guard NPC at the doorway

notable_agents.action: hooded guard standing at the entrance holding a staff with fur decorations

entered.detail: large timber doorway frame with thick wooden posts
burning torch mounted on the interior wooden wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the cold exterior into the warm, torchlit interior of the longhouse. A hooded guard stands to the right at the entrance as the character passes through the thick wooden doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal longhouse interior corridor with stone shrine

events.description: arrives at the illuminated stone shrine at the far end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit wooden corridor toward the stone shrine at the far end

entered.detail: wooden benches lining the sides of the corridor
stone altar wall with multiple lit candles and carved tribal decorations
tribal furs and rope decorations hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: Inside the long corridor of the longhouse, the character walks past wooden benches and tribal decorations toward a brightly lit stone shrine at the far end. The space is dimly lit by scattered candles, creating a warm, intimate atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, snowy village square into the warm, candlelit sanctuary of a tribal longhouse. It begins with the character walking through the night air past a burning campfire and a seated villager, moving steadily toward the torchlit facade of a large wooden building. As the character ascends the stone steps, the outdoor darkness recedes and the wooden structure fills the frame before the camera crosses the threshold into the interior. The scene then shifts from the freezing exterior to a dimly lit corridor where the character passes a hooded guard and walks alongside wooden benches and tribal decorations. Finally, the movement leads through the intimate, candlelit space toward a brightly lit stone shrine at the far end of the hall.
